summary: Comprehensive testing of Support/Customer Service system overhaul. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Customer Support page loads correctly with stats/tabs/contact options, AI Assistant chatbot opens in full-screen overlay with hibernate state preserving conversations, New Chat button creates fresh sessions, 'Talk to human agent' link visible, Customer ticket creation dialog correctly hides Priority field, Admin Customer Service page has Create Ticket button, Create on Behalf modal works with customer/operator selection, Admin ticket detail modal has only ONE close button with proper sidebar showing tags/product/requester info.

issues: Minor console warning: chart width/height -1 error (Recharts library issue, doesn't affect functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: All features correctly implemented per requirements
AI Chatbot using GPT-4o via Emergent LLM key working correctly
Hibernate state (session persistence in MongoDB) working - reopening chatbot shows previous conversations
Customer ticket creation correctly hides Priority field (enforced medium priority)
Admin ticket detail modal uses [&>button]:hidden CSS to hide default close button and provides single 'Close' text button
Auto-tags based on category/service correctly generated
Create on behalf feature allows admins to create tickets for customers/operators
seed_data_creation: Test tickets created via backend API tests (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support/Customer Service system fully tested and working. Backend APIs: /api/support/chat, /api/support/chat/sessions, /api/support/chat/new-session, /api/support-tickets/, /api/support-tickets/from-chat, /api/support-tickets/create-on-behalf, /api/support-tickets/products all verified. Frontend: Customer Support page (/support), AI Chatbot overlay, Admin Customer Service (/management/customer-service) all working. GPT-4o integration working via Emergent LLM key.

customer_support_page.details: Stats cards (Total/Open/In Progress/Resolved), contact options (Call/Email/AI Chat), My Tickets tab, FAQ tab all visible and working

ai_assistant_chatbot.details: Full-screen overlay opens correctly, New Chat button creates fresh session, message sending works, GPT-4o responses received, 'Talk to human agent' link visible, closing preserves conversations (hibernate state)

customer_ticket_creation.details: Subject, Category, Service, Product Involved, Description fields visible. Priority field correctly HIDDEN for customers. Auto-tags generated based on category/service.

admin_customer_service.details: Create Ticket button visible, Dashboard/Tickets/Team tabs working, statistics and charts displayed

admin_create_on_behalf.details: Modal opens with Customer/Operator toggle, user search, Subject, Category, Priority, Service, Product, Description fields. Priority IS visible for admins.

admin_ticket_detail_modal.details: Only ONE close button (no duplicate X). Sidebar shows Status, Priority, Assigned To, Category, Requester info, Created date, Tags. Reply area with Public Reply checkbox.

backend_apis.details: All 17 tests passed: chat sessions, messages, ticket CRUD, create-on-behalf, products endpoint, ticket assignment, status updates
